jobs.title: GIS Analyst I/II

GIS Analyst I requires no professional experience; GIS Analyst II requires two years of similar GIS experience. Work involves GIS databases, mapping, spatial analysis, and integration with utility systems.

jobs.title: GIS Analyst

jobs.title: GIS Analyst

jobs.title: GIS Analyst
jobs.description: U.S. citizenship and background check required. Associate degree or technical training in underground utility mapping, 1–2 years GIS/GPS field collection experience, ability to interpret as-built drawings; GPR/EMF locating experience preferred.

jobs.title: GIS Analyst
jobs.description: 3+ years ESRI ArcGIS Pro/Online; programming and automation with Python, Arcade, JavaScript, SQL; GIS development, data modeling, field data collection, and web GIS.
